zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES於大約1173年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利素雷斯時，她的父親Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES11171歲，母親Berthe de Rancon26歲。她於1195年與Geoffroi V de RANCON在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1235年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特圖頌享年64歲。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES was born about 1173, in Surgères, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES, was 11171 and her mother, Berthe de Rancon, was 26. She married Geoffroi V de RANCON in 1195, in Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1235, in Tusson, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES est née environ 1173, à Surgères, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES, avait 11171 ans et sa mère, Berthe de Rancon, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroi V de RANCON en 1195, à Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1235, à Tusson, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES um 1173 in Surgères, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES 11171 und ihre Mutter Berthe de Rancon 26. Sie hat 1195 in Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Geoffroi V de RANCON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1235 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Tusson, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES è nata il circa 1173 nel Surgères, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES, aveva 11171 anni e sua madre, Berthe de Rancon, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroi V de RANCON nel 1195, nel Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1235, nel Tusson, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERESが約1173年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエンテ-マリティメスルグeレスで生まれた時，父Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERESは11171歳，母Berthe de Ranconは26歳であった。1195年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドでGeoffroi V de RANCONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1235年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントトゥソンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES(이)가 대략 1173년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처테-마이팀 수르그e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES(은)는 11171세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Berthe de Rancon(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1195년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드에서 Geoffroi V de RANCON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1235년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 투슨에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1173–ABT 1235: tany ho any amin'ny 1173–tany ho any amin'ny 1235

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES nasceu aproximadamente 1173, em Surgères, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES, tinha 11171 anos e sua mãe, Berthe de Rancon, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroi V de RANCON em 1195, em Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1235, em Tusson, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES родилась около 1173 г. в местности сургeресь, чаренте-маритим, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES было 11171 год, а матери, которую звали Berthe de Rancon, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroi V de RANCON в 1195 г. в местности гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1235 г. в местности туссон, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

sm.ABT 1173–ABT 1235: e tusa o le 1173–e tusa o le 1235

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES nació aproximadamente 1173, en Surgères, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guillaume III MAINGOT de SURGERES, tenía 11171 años y su mamá, Berthe de Rancon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Geoffroi V de RANCON en 1195, en Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1235, en Tusson, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
